scripts.build: sed -i 's|<!--BUILD_ID-->|'$VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_SHA'|g' client/script/version.js && sed -i 's|<!--BUILD_ID-->|'$VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_SHA'|g' client/index.html && mkdir -p public/stylesheets && cp client/index.html public/index.html && cp -a client/stylesheets/. public/stylesheets/ && esbuild client/script/main.js --bundle --minify --outfile=public/script/bundle.js
